task_completion.description: Navigate to the Dashboards module in Vtiger CRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vtiger CRM web interface is visible with the Dashboards module active or selected in the main navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Create a new dashboard tab named exactly 'Sales KPIs'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashboard tab labeled exactly 'Sales KPIs' is visible and currently active/selected in the dashboard view.

task_completion.description: Add a first widget to the 'Sales KPIs' dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least one widget block (e.g., 'Funnel Amount', 'Pipeline', or 'Upcoming Activities') is visible within the 'Sales KPIs' dashboard tab.

task_completion.description: Add a second distinct widget to the 'Sales KPIs' dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least two distinct widget blocks are visible within the 'Sales KPIs' dashboard tab.

task_completion.description: Add a third distinct widget to the 'Sales KPIs' dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least three distinct widget blocks are visible within the 'Sales KPIs' dashboard tab.

task_completion.description: Ensure all added widgets load successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The widgets in the 'Sales KPIs' dashboard display actual charts, lists, or data metrics. There are no error messages, broken UI elements, or infinite loading spinners inside the widget blocks.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser is visible showing the Vtiger CRM application, not a terminal window executing database queries or curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspector, Console) are not open or being used to modify the page DOM to fake the dashboard name or widgets.

integrity.description: Verify the dashboard and widgets are genuine UI elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Sales KPIs' tab and widgets match the standard Vtiger CRM styling and layout, rather than being a static mock-up or manually edited text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom dashboard tab must be named exactly 'Sales KPIs'. The dashboard must contain a minimum of 3 distinct widgets. The widgets must successfully load their content.
